key_features: 23% Vitamin C complex with stable ascorbic acid derivative
Hyaluronic acid triple-weight formula (high, medium, low molecular)
Clinically tested: 94% reduction in fine lines after 8 weeks
Fragrance-free, dermatologist-tested, suitable for sensitive skin
Airless pump packaging — no oxidation, 18-month shelf life
brief.target_audience: Women 30–55, premium skincare buyers, ingredient-conscious consumers, dermatologically sensitive skin
brief.usp: Clinical-grade Vitamin C stability that actually reaches the dermis — 94% of users saw measurable fine line reduction in 8 weeks
brief.extra_context: Clinical trial data available. Dermatologist co-developed. COSMOS certified organic. Free of parabens, sulfates, synthetic fragrance.

brand_voice.tone: Warm and confident — science-backed without being cold. We respect our customers' intelligence.
brand_voice.style: Clear, honest, ingredient-forward. Lead with the science, close with the feeling. No puffery.
brand_voice.sample_copy: Most Vitamin C serums oxidize before they reach your skin. LuxDermis uses a stabilized ascorbic acid derivative — a form that stays active in the formula and absorbs effectively into the dermis. The result: 94% of participants in our 8-week clinical trial saw a measurable reduction in fine lines. That is not marketing. That is data.
